welcome:
👋 **Hi, {name}!**

I am a multifunctional and fast bot. 🚀 Here are my features:

📥 **Media Download**
- Instagram (Reels, Post, Story, IGTV)
- YouTube, TikTok, Pinterest, Likee, and more
- Extract audio (MP3) from videos

🎵 **Music Recognition (Shazam)**
- Send a video, audio, or voice message, and I will find the music. ⚡️

🔄 **Video Note (Circle Video)**
- Send me an MP4 video, and I will convert it to a video note. 🎥

🔗 Simply send me a link to download media and wait!
music_mode_info:
🎵 **Music Recognition Mode**

Send me:
🎤 Voice message
🎧 Audio file
📹 Video file

⚡️ I will find the music via Shazam!
lyrics_not_found: 😔 Lyrics not found for this song.
recog_not_found:
😔 **Music not found.**

💡 Tip: For better results, make sure the music is loud and clear.
recog_hall_error: ⚠️ Could not build Concert Hall version.
recog_error: ⚠️ Could not download music, but you can find it via the links above.
referral_title:
👥 **Referral System**

Your referral link:
`{link}`

Invited friends: {count}

Unlock more features by inviting friends! 🎁
sub_required: ⚠️ You must subscribe to the following channels to use the bot:
help:
❓ **Help**

Using the bot is easy:
1. Send a video link.
2. Select quality.
3. Receive your video!

You can also send audio/video to identify music.
admin_channel_add_prompt:
Send Channel ID and Title.
Format: `ID | Title | Username | InviteLink` (Username/InviteLink are optional, use `none` if empty)

Examples:
1️⃣ Public: `-100123 | My Channel | my_chan | none` 
2️⃣ Private: `-100456 | Private Chan | none | https://t.me/+abc`
admin_channel_invalid_format: ❌ Invalid format. Please send as in the example.
